blockingIssues.description: Concurrent saveSession calls are not fully serialized because syncSessionArtifacts runs outside the save lock, allowing docs artifact write interleaving.
Completion-gate matrix validates recovery.errorCode instead of the contract-required recovery kind semantics for VAL-CORRECT-023..031.
The required-final-review-not-passing matrix case is not isolated from an earlier optional-final-review guard, so that dedicated check can be dropped without failing the test.
Derived path builders still accept IDs containing '..' as a substring (for example safe..id), which does not fully satisfy the input-hardening requirement.
Uninstall coverage does not independently test canonical-only and legacy-only seeded homes, leaving path-specific uninstall behavior insufficiently verified.
flow_review_record_final still allows payloads containing featureId to bypass rejection because schema parsing strips unknown keys before runtime scope validation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit test-only/validation-only execution variants so red-first and commit-order requirements are applied appropriately by feature type.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Skill-procedure mismatch was reported across multiple correctness-hardening reviews (m2-input-validation, m2-install-target-migration, m2-legacy-migration, m2-regression-randomize, m2-tool-semantics-fixes).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify and enforce auditable procedure compliance signals (required doc reads and followedProcedure reporting) to avoid transcript/handoff inconsistencies.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m2-completion-gates and m2-tool-semantics-fixes reviews reported discrepancies between transcript skeleton evidence and followedProcedure status.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Resolve and standardize completion-recovery assertion semantics (kind vs errorCode) so contracts, tests, and runtime surfaces align.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m2-completion-gates review identified contract text requiring kind assertions while runtime recovery currently exposes errorCode.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance that feature verification steps must reference existing repo paths/commands to prevent stale or non-existent test-file references.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m2-install-target-migration review found features.json verificationSteps pointing to a non-existent tests/install-target.test.ts path.

rejectedObservations.observation: Formatter write commands may be blocked in worker mode and should be documented as a universal skill rule.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous: this appears environment/policy specific and was observed in a single review only.

rejectedObservations.observation: Canonical barrel import guidance should require exporting ensureWorkspace from src/runtime/session.ts.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented/low-signal: one-off friction that does not currently demonstrate a systemic correctness or validation failure.

rejectedObservations.observation: Additional red-first procedure mismatch notes across multiple features.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate: consolidated into systemic core-worker skill guidance recommendations above.
